text: Gyɩŋbɔŋ hʋ kaŋ baal hʋ kɩ kyele aŋ kyɩɩrɩ yʋga aŋ lɩɩ baal hʋ tɩyaŋ.
translated: Gyɩŋbɔŋ went along the road and saw someone crossing the river, and worked on the road.

ref: Do something to show you have really given up your sins.
text: Ma kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ aa daga anɩɩ ma bɩrɩma lɩɩ ma wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ nɛ,
translated: I don't know what to say and I can't find the words because my heart is heavy with sorrow.

ref: A good tree cannot produce bad fruit, and a bad tree cannot produce good fruit.
text: Tɩya hʋ aa kaŋ laaŋfɩya bɩ sɩ wuwo nɔŋ nɔŋbɔŋlɔrɩnɩ, tɩya hʋ mɛ aa bɩ kaŋ laaŋfɩya bɩ sɩ wuwo nɔŋ nɔŋweliye.
translated: Those who fly long and dwell among the children of Nongbonglorini, and those who remain there dwelling among the children of Nongweliye.

ref: The kingdom of heaven is like what happens when a shop owner is looking for fine pearls.
text: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ bayalʋʋ aa gɔllɩ kɩ kyɛ sɩfɩyaŋbʋyɩ kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ pɛɛl.
translated: Jesus said to them, "I have come to give eternal life to those who follow me, and they will never perish."

ref: During the meal Jesus took some bread in his hands. He blessed the bread and broke it. Then he gave it to his disciples and said, “Take this and eat it. This is my body.”
text: Ba aa hɔnɔ kɩ di kɩna hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ Yesu kpa paanʋʋ a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ aŋ kaŋ lɔgɔ lɔgɔ a kpa tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ aŋ baa, “Ma laa kyaŋ. Ŋ teŋbii rɛ nyɛ.”
translated: And after he had said this, Jesus commanded his disciples to wait in the city until the Holy Spirit would come upon them and clothe them with power from heaven, saying, "I am with you always. Until the end of the age."

ref: The spirit shook him. Then it gave a loud shout and left.
text: Gyɩŋbɔŋ hʋ kaŋ baal hʋ kɩ kyele aŋ kyɩɩrɩ yʋga aŋ lɩɩ baal hʋ tɩyaŋ.
translated: Gyɩŋbɔŋ went, and when he went, he ate and kyɩɩrɩ yʋga, and then went again today.

ref: Do something to show you have really given up your sins.
text: Ma kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ aa daga anɩɩ ma bɩrɩma lɩɩ ma wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ nɛ,
translated: If I want to speak to you and do something, and I have understood, can you listen?

ref: A good tree cannot produce bad fruit, and a bad tree cannot produce good fruit.
text: Tɩya hʋ aa kaŋ laaŋfɩya bɩ sɩ wuwo nɔŋ nɔŋbɔŋlɔrɩnɩ, tɩya hʋ mɛ aa bɩ kaŋ laaŋfɩya bɩ sɩ wuwo nɔŋ nɔŋweliye.
translated: This is not equal to Nong Bonglorini, and this is not equal to Nong Weliye either.

ref: The kingdom of heaven is like what happens when a shop owner is looking for fine pearls.
text: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ bayalʋʋ aa gɔllɩ kɩ kyɛ sɩfɩyaŋbʋyɩ kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ pɛɛl.
translated: He said to Jesus, “Will you come into the world to see the light, the true way of eternal life?”

ref: During the meal Jesus took some bread in his hands. He blessed the bread and broke it. Then he gave it to his disciples and said, “Take this and eat it. This is my body.”
text: Ba aa hɔnɔ kɩ di kɩna hʋ tɩyaŋ nɛ Yesu kpa paanʋʋ a kyʋwalɩ Wɩɩsɩ aŋgyʋwasʋ aŋ kaŋ lɔgɔ lɔgɔ a kpa tɩya ʋ hatɩnna hʋ aŋ baa, “Ma laa kyaŋ. Ŋ teŋbii rɛ nyɛ.”
translated: And then he went to Galilee, teaching in the synagogues and filled with the Holy Spirit, and he healed many people, and he said, "I am the light. I was sent to you."

ref: The spirit shook him. Then it gave a loud shout and left.
text: Gyɩŋbɔŋ hʋ kaŋ baal hʋ kɩ kyele aŋ kyɩɩrɩ yʋga aŋ lɩɩ baal hʋ tɩyaŋ.
translated: Gyɩŋbɔŋ and they went to speak the good word and arrived today.

ref: Do something to show you have really given up your sins.
text: Ma kɩ yaa wɩya hʋ aa daga anɩɩ ma bɩrɩma lɩɩ ma wɩbɔmɔ tɩyaŋ nɛ,
translated: Why did I go to the place where I worked and ate, and then slept?

ref: A good tree cannot produce bad fruit, and a bad tree cannot produce good fruit.

translated: This is how they do the important things, and this is not how they do the ordinary things.

ref: The kingdom of heaven is like what happens when a shop owner is looking for fine pearls.
text: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ bayalʋʋ aa gɔllɩ kɩ kyɛ sɩfɩyaŋbʋyɩ kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ pɛɛl.
translated: Jesus said, "I will send the Paraclete who will teach you all things and remind you of everything I have told you."

ref: During the meal Jesus took some bread in his hands. He blessed the bread and broke it. Then he gave it to his disciples and said, “Take this and eat it. This is my body.”

translated: In Gyɩŋbɔŋ, he goes into the house to meet someone and eat food, and then comes to the water.

translated: I will be the child who goes there, and then I crossed the river I saw.

ref: A good tree cannot produce bad fruit, and a bad tree cannot produce good fruit.

translated: This is how he makes the thing with his hands in the red earth, and this is how he also makes the thing with his hands in the white earth.

ref: The kingdom of heaven is like what happens when a shop owner is looking for fine pearls.
text: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ bayalʋʋ aa gɔllɩ kɩ kyɛ sɩfɩyaŋbʋyɩ kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ pɛɛl.

translated: Gyɩŋbɔŋ went to the children and spoke to them, teaching and loving them during that time.

translated: I didn't go to the market because I was sick and couldn't eat anything, so I stayed home all day, right?

ref: A good tree cannot produce bad fruit, and a bad tree cannot produce good fruit.

translated: This is how they caused the sound to buzz and boom; this is how they caused the sound to buzz and spread.

ref: The kingdom of heaven is like what happens when a shop owner is looking for fine pearls.
text: Ɛɛ rɛ Yesu bɩl baa, “Wɩɩsɩbee koro hʋ kɩɩ gɛɛ rɛ anɩɩ bayalʋʋ aa gɔllɩ kɩ kyɛ sɩfɩyaŋbʋyɩ kɩdɩgɩ ba aa yɩrɩ pɛɛl.
translated: I am the resurrection and the life. Whoever believes in me, though he die, yet shall he live, and everyone who lives and believes in me shall never die.

ref: During the meal Jesus took some bread in his hands. He blessed the bread and broke it. Then he gave it to his disciples and said, “Take this and eat it. This is my body.”

translated: Then he healed a man’s withered hand on the Sabbath, so that Jesus withdrew to the region of Galilee with his disciples, and a great crowd followed him from Galilee, Decapolis, Jerusalem, Judea, and beyond the Jordan, and he taught them many things in parables, saying, "I have come to cast fire on the earth, and would that it were already kindled!"

ref: The spirit shook him. Then it gave a loud shout and left.

translated: Gyimbong and their children went to the water in the big village, and the child was seen on the road.
